name: Sismique Ambulant
description: Progéniture massive dont chaque pas déclenche une onde sismique. Son corps vibre en permanence, projetant des pulsations telluriques qui disloquent les formations ennemies.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, massive rock creature stomping the ground sending seismic shockwaves, body made of fractured tectonic plates, glowing red cracks, dust and debris flying, ground shattering around it, epic scale, cinematic lighting
